architecture.description: No existing codebase. Project root contains only spec files. This is a brand-new Next.js static export app.
architecture.target_stack: Next.js 14 (static export) + React + TypeScript + Chakra UI v2

extension_points.name: content/
extension_points.description: Bundled topic JSON files parsed at build time

extension_points.name: src/hooks/
extension_points.description: Custom React hooks for progress, settings, study times

testing.note: No existing tests. Will set up Jest + React Testing Library for unit tests and Playwright for E2E.

conventions: Next.js App Router or Pages Router (Pages Router preferred for static export simplicity)
Chakra UI v2 for all styling
localStorage keys prefixed with lp_ as per spec
Content as JSON in /public/content/ or /content/ imported at build time
